zh.lifeSummary: Agnes是Conrad的女兒，出生。她和Duke of Bavaria Orthon至少有1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Agnes是Conrad的女儿，出生。她和Duke of Bavaria Orthon至少有1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English; French (Agnès); Hungarian (Ágnes): from a female personal name, which is from Late Latin Agnes and this one from Greek Hagnē, from hagnē ‘pure, chaste’. Saint Agnes was a Christian virgin martyr, one of those who suffered under the persecutions of Diocletian in 303 AD . Her name was associated by folk etymology with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, and in medieval art she is often depicted with a lamb (the lamb of God). See also English Annis .

American shortened (and altered) form of rare Greek metronymics Agnidis or Agniadis, both derived from the female personal name Hagnē (see 1 above), or of patronymics like Anagnostopoulos (compare Agnew 4).

variants.name: Ann
meanings: habitational name from Abbots Ann in Hampshire, named for the stream that runs through it, which is most probably named with an ancient Celtic word meaning ‘water’.
possibly from the Middle English female personal name Ann(e), which is normally a pet form of Agnes (Middle English Annes), since the Biblical homonym was not common before the 15th century.

variants.name: Ines
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Doroteo, Acacio, Adolfo, Alejandro, Armando, Aura, Bernabe, Desiderio, Ernesto, Eustaquio, Gilberto, Jose.
Portuguese (Inês) and Spanish: from a vernacular form of the Late Latin female personal name Agnes .

variants.name: Annese
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Pasquale, Rocco, Salvatore, Cosmo, Domenico, Fedele, Marco, Nino, Pietro, Romeo, Sandro, Vito.
Italian: from a variant of Agnese, Italian form of the female personal name Agnes .

variants.name: Annis
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English female personal name Annes, Old French Anes, from Late Latin Agnes .

variants.name: D'Agnese
meanings: Italian (also Dagnese): metronymic from the female personal name Agnese, from Late Latin Agnes .

en.lifeSummary: Agnes was born as the daughter of Conrad. She had at least 1 daughter with Duke of Bavaria Orthon.

fr.lifeSummary: Agnes est née, fille de Conrad. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Duke of Bavaria Orthon.

de.lifeSummary: Agnes wurde, als Tochter von Conrad geboren. Sie hatte mit Duke of Bavaria Orthon mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Agnes è nata il come figlia di Conrad. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Duke of Bavaria Orthon.

ja.lifeSummary: AgnesはConradの娘として生まれた。彼女はDuke of Bavaria Orthonとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes(은)는 Conrad의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Duke of Bavaria Orthon(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Agnes родилась. Её отца звали Conrad. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Duke of Bavaria Orthon.
